title: quercus rubra f. cuneata
intro: Quercus rubra f. cuneata, also known as the Red Oak, is a unique variety of the Quercus rubra species, specifically characterized by its narrow, wedge-shaped leaves. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus rubra f. cuneata include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of Quercus rubra f. cuneata can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
